name: CHAMELEON
short_description: Psychedelic Art Puzzle. In this world, you can expand your territory by changing the color to match the around colors, like a Chameleon. Simple play, variety of rules and attractive characters.You should be addicted by Chameleon.
detailed_description:
Psychedelic Art Puzzle has returned!

Four Chameleon sisters are in battle for their own territory!

Features

1 color select
Simple control! Just select one color of the 7 colors.

2 players mode
Two players can battle and test each other's ability to think by off-line or Steam Remote Play Together.

3 rules
You can play it on three rules.
Basic rule : Occupy more than 50% of the field with your colors.
King rule: Take more the King tiles than your opponent.
Goal rule: Be first to reach the flag.

4 attractive characters
You can select from four characters like Japanese Anime with their each abilities.
